faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in North Bergen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in North Bergen typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method used. We offer free inspections and provide detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in North Bergen?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in North Bergen take 2-4 hours for initial service, with heat treatments typically completed in one day. Chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to ensure all bed bugs and eggs are eliminated. We'll provide a specific timeline during your inspection.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my North Bergen home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to lethal levels. For chemical treatments, we typically recommend staying out for 4-6 hours until surfaces dry. Pets should also be removed during treatment, and we'll provide detailed preparation instructions.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my North Bergen apartment or home?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use family-friendly and pet-safe products, and heat treatments are completely chemical-free. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols to protect your North Bergen property and loved ones.
